title.en: COMPUTATIONAL CHEMISTRY; CHEMOINFORMATICS; COMPUTATIONAL MATERIALS SCIENCE
Computational theoretical chemistry, i.e. ICT specially adapted for theoretical aspects of quantum chemistry, molecular mechanics, molecular dynamics or the like
Chemoinformatics, i.e. ICT specially adapted for the handling of physicochemical or structural data of chemical particles, elements, compounds or mixtures
Analysis or design of chemical reactions, syntheses or processes
Identification of molecular entities, parts thereof or of chemical compositions
Prediction of properties of chemical compounds, compositions or mixtures
Searching chemical structures or physicochemical data
Machine learning, data mining or chemometrics
Programming languages; Computing architectures; Database systems; Data warehousing

Computational materials science, i.e. ICT specially adapted for investigating the physical or chemical properties of materials or phenomena associated with their design, synthesis, processing, characterisation or utilisation
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
